changes.value:
kanban-app/src/commands.rs:1431-1597

The function uses the fully-qualified path `crate::watcher::WatchEvent` over 30 times instead of importing it at the top of the function or file. This makes the already long function harder to read.

Suggestion: Add `use crate::watcher::{WatchEvent, BoardWatchEvent};` at the file level (other imports from crate::watcher are already used in the file) or at the function level.",
<parameter name="tags">["review-finding"]
NIT: Verbose crate::watcher:: prefix used 30+ times in flush_and_emit_for_handle
